headline: Is Broadcom (AVGO) Still Undervalued As Netlist Patent Claims Test Sentiment?
summary: Broadcom (AVGO) is back in focus after the U.S. International Trade Commission opened an investigation into Samsung memory products and several customers, including Broadcom, following a patent infringement complaint from Netlist. See our latest analysis for Broadcom. Broadcom’s share price has been choppy, with a 1-day share price return of 1.98% after recent regulatory headlines, a 30-day share price return that is down 8.07%, and a 90-day share price return that is down 5.97%.
